name: frontend-typed-event-bus
title: Phase D: Frontend typed event bus
description: Introduce a typed frontend event bus layer on top of WebSocket messages to normalize snapshot/event/log handling and prepare for optimistic UI and agent panel features.
creator: zquant
notes: Typed event bus implementation completed. Protocol types aligned with backend, decoder with complete field-level validation (6 fields for JobSummary), reducer handles incomplete events correctly. Vitest configured with 11 passing tests. All review rounds passed.
